title: The Exploration Pack
description: An immersive vanilla-plus world full of new biomes, dungeons, creatures and dimensions
body:
# 🌍 The Exploration Pack  

A chill, vanilla-plus modpack that makes every dimension better, including the Overworld, while throwing in some brand new ones to check out. You will find huge structures, mysterious dungeons, upgraded villages, revamped caves and forests, and creatures you’ve never seen before.

---

## ✨ Highlights & Features

### 🌳 Massive World Overhaul
Way more biomes and better ones too, thanks to:
- **Biomes O’ Plenty** and **Nature’s Spirit**

### 🏘️ Countless New and Overhauled Structures & Dungeons
You’ll stumble across all kinds of new places:
- **Mo’ Structures**
- **Repurposed Structures**
- **Deeper and Darker**
- **Philips Ruins**
- **Dungeons+**
- **Sky Villages**

### 🌌 Overhauled and New Dimensions
- **The Aether**
- **The Afterdark**
- **BetterNether**
- **BetterEnd**

### 🧩 Thousands of New Blocks & Decorations
- **Chipped**
- **Chisel Reborn**
- **McW-Furniture**

### 🐮 New Creatures & Improved Mobs
You’ll see:
- Upgraded vanilla mobs
- Animals you’ve never seen before  

### 🍞 Expanded Farming & Food Systems
Including:
- **Farmer’s Delight**
- **Croptopia**
- **Nature’s Delight**
- **Mo’ Foods**

### ⚙️ Quality-of-Life & Comfort Features
- Backpacks  
- New weapons and tools  
- Magic systems  
- Additional enchantments  
- Practical QoL improvements  

### 🖥️ Optimized & Stable
Runs smooth thanks to the following performance mods:
- **Sodium**
- **Lithium**
- **Ferrite Core**
- **ModernFix**
- **Iris** (shader support)
- **Distant Horizons**

---

## 🧭 Who Is This Pack For?

If you love to explore new or overhauled dimensions and also love building, this modpack is for you! 

 *Have fun!*
